highlights.text: I wrote Wednesday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
As we know, insitutions buy dips in a very particular way: Via my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
If 6923 fails ES must hold 6904 lowest or we retrace hard.” Last evening ES opened up with a gap down, quick bear trap/Failed Breakdown below the range, then back up.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.

post_title: Hard Rally For SPX, But Can It Make It To All Time Highs? Jan 27 Plan
